intro_body: A personalised feed of announcements, projects, events, services and alerts in your community — filtered by your sub-region, language and interests.
empty_state: Nothing new in the last 30 days. Check back soon, or update your preferences below to broaden the feed.
prefs_cadence_off: Off — don't send me a digest
prefs_sub_region_help: Leave blank to use the sub-region on your profile.
prefs_save_error: Couldn't save your preferences. Please try again.
error_loading: Couldn't load your digest. Please try again.
